eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Mower, MN; at 7:05 PM on JUL 8, 2026 Effective until 8:05 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Mower County/City of Austin MN- No travel advised due to extreme flooding on roadways. Do not travel through water or drive around barricades.
